title: bKeyAll
description: A simple plugin for a functional KeyAll. Suitable for lifesteal and SMP
body:
# ⭐ BKeyAll | Automatic KeyAll Plugin

BKeyAll is a lightweight and fully configurable automatic KeyAll plugin for Spigot, Paper, and Purpur, compatible with Minecraft 1.8 to 1.21.11.
It allows you to automatically reward online players at fixed intervals, with no performance impact and full control from the configuration file.

The plugin runs an internal countdown system and can execute the KeyAll even after server restarts. You can also decide whether the KeyAll should run or be skipped when the server is empty.


### 🎁 Rewards

Rewards are executed as console commands and can be fully customized:
Give one or multiple rewards per KeyAll
Choose between fixed rewards or random rewards
Create different reward groups based on permissions
All permissions start with bkeyall, making it perfect for VIP and rank systems

### 📢 Announcements & Visual Effects

BKeyAll supports fully customizable reminders to keep players informed:
Chat announcements before the KeyAll (default: 5 minutes)
Unlimited custom reminder times
Optional Titles, Subtitles, and BossBars
Visual effects for both reminders and the KeyAll execution

![titles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47de1073604ebe0c4128ea44220557f10cff9c43_0.webp)

### 🔌 PlaceholderAPI Support

The plugin includes PlaceholderAPI integration with a built-in placeholder:
```
%bkeyall_time_left%
```
![placeholder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72755414a016bf2655adf4b13924fbcac313d6a5_0.webp)

The time format is fully configurable.

### ⚙️ Commands

/bkeyall reload — Reload the configuration
/bkeyall force — Force a KeyAll manually
/bkeyall time — Check the remaining time

# SERVER LIST

Want to list your server to everyone? list you server on https://blackowlzz.eu/servers !

![bstat](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/BKeyAll.svg/)
